subcodes.first_line: Your detailed letter was received, and its contents were thoroughly noted. That which is conducive to the exaltation of man [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه مفصل شما رسید و بر مطالب مفصله اطلاع حاصل گردید آنچه سبب عزت انسانست
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @service to others; to the Cause of God
